## Summary

- 

## Type of change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] `feat` - new feature
- [ ] `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - documentation only
- [ ] `chore` - maintenance or tooling
- [ ] `refactor` - behavior-preserving code change
- [ ] `test` - tests added or updated
- [ ] `build` - build or dependency configuration
- [ ] `ci` - continuous integration configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally or in CI.
- [ ] Commits are signed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated or not required.
- [ ] Security checks are green, including `analyze` and `gitleaks`.
- [ ] Required checks are green: `test`, `build`, `analyze`, and `gitleaks`.
- [ ] Linked issue is included or not required.
